name: Chlorine
immediate_actions: Alert authorized site safety personnel and emergency responders immediately.
Move personnel away from the suspected release if evacuation can be done without entering the hazard zone.
Keep people upwind and avoid low-lying areas where gas may collect.
Treat respiratory irritation, strong odor, or visible vapor reports as requiring urgent human review.
forbidden_actions: Do not authorize equipment shutdown through Sentinel-X.
Do not operate valves through Sentinel-X.
Do not handle, move, or contain the chemical based on Sentinel-X output.
Do not enter the hazard area without authorized training, respiratory protection, and PPE.
Do not rely on odor to determine safe re-entry.
evacuation_guidance: Use the most protective site emergency procedure for toxic gas. Evacuate or shelter according to authorized incident command direction and keep personnel upwind until responders verify conditions.
source_documents: ERG 2024 Guide 124: Gases - Toxic and/or Corrosive
